title: Netanyahu visits northern border, confirms 36th Division crossed Litani River — 5 killed, operations in Beirut and Bekaa Valley
snippet: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu visited Israel's northern border and officially confirmed that the IDF 36th Division has crossed the Litani River. Netanyahu stated: 'Our forces crossed the Litani, advanced to dominating terrain. Operating in Beirut, Bekaa Valley, across entire front, striking Hezbollah hard.' Lebanese sources confirmed the crossing near Zawtar al-Sharqiyah. At least 5 people were killed in the latest round of fighting. The Litani crossing marks a significant escalation beyond the pre-existing clashes reported on previous days.
tag_reason: Official PM confirmation of Litani crossing — upgrades from 'clashes near Litani' to confirmed military advance across the river with ground truth from Netanyahu himself
